title: Midrian - Redstone Revolution
description: It simplifies all Redstone logic gates into single, functional blocks.
body:
Technologies advance as fast as they shrink in size. Unfortunately, this isn't the case for redstone, as creating complex logic gates takes up a lot of space.

Until now.

With this mod, I've created a block for each existing logic gate (AND, OR, NOT, NOR, XOR, XNOR, NAND). The expectation is that this will reduce the size of structures designed for complex redstone mechanisms by a few percent. Of course, this should also visually assist those less familiar with the redstone system but who have knowledge of electronic circuits.

I can't wait to see what they'll create with this!

Bug reports: midarian.comercial@gmail.com
